name: Sirius
description: The brightest star in the night sky.

name: Canopus
description: The second-brightest star in the night sky.

name: Alpha Centauri
description: The closest star system to the Solar System.

name: Arcturus
description: A red giant star in the northern hemisphere.

name: Vega
description: The brightest star in the constellation Lyra.

name: Capella
description: A quadruple star system in Auriga.

name: Rigel
description: A blue supergiant star in Orion.

name: Procyon
description: A white main-sequence star in Canis Minor.
